name: Anime Babes: Solitaire
short_description: Everybody's favourite single player game, and now you can pretend to be playing solitaire while you do it.
detailed_description:
Update Notes

3rd Dec

Small achievement update:
We didn't want to make achievement hunters sad, so now you'll unlock the achievements either by winning each mode OR attempting it 100 times. Some of the modes (particularly Tam O Shanter) are quite literally luck of the draw, and it could take thousands of games to see a single win, and that's objectively not fun.

The played count goes up after 1 move, so if you hate a certain mode but love getting achievements, you can cheese it by just restarting after the first move 100x.

21th Nov


Major patch will be out in the next few days, just fixing up a couple of small things:

Achievements will be available, for 1/5/10 wins of each mode (we didn't want to make it too grindy as there's a LOT of different game modes). We're trying to make them work retroactively for people who have already played the game as there's been a win counter in the game since mid-October.

A dozen+ new game modes will also be available

17th Oct

Minor freecell bugfix

Testing on another couple of new game modes

12th Oct

Release day!

Fixed a minor issue with the autoplay at the end of a game causing unnecessary load on some GPUs
Started testing three new additional game modes

10th Oct

A few last minute tweaks in preparation for launch.

Added a few more customisation options - you can change the background colour & the colour of the back of the cards, as well as adding some safe for work decks you can switch to if you just really wanna play solitaire.

5th Oct

A free DLC for a simple .pdf artbook has been created (pending Valve approval for the store page), and Spider Solitaire now works with one suit, two suits or four suits

29th Sept

Added a different (better) version of the original deck
The original version is available in options as deck "Anime Babes 2"
Added single-suit Spider Solitaire


About the Game

Solitaire. Everybody knows it, and everybody loves it even more when it involves hot anime girls. Simple, relaxing, and fun.

Simple, mouse-only controls

Optional 18+ version out - check forums for access information

Dozens of game modes, including the classics:

Original (Klondike) - Draw 1, Draw 3, and Two-Deck modes available
Free Cell
Tri Peaks
Spider - 1 suit, 2 suit, 4 suit
Pyramid

Some of the game modes are completely luck based and can get quite frustrating, the guides section has information about which modes are easiest to win, as well as a more thorough explanation of the rules of each mode.

Even though the game is listed as being only in English, the only text is the menu - if you already know how to play Solitaire, it should be okay in any language.
